args.summary: Customer harper_garcia_8677 wants to modify reservation BHOHRG (flight HAT097 on 2024-05-10 from DTW to PHX). However, the flight has already been flown (today is 2024-05-15). Customer wants to change flight dates by 2 days, upgrade cabin to business (already business), and add 2 extra checked bags. Since the flight has already been taken, this requires human agent assistance as automated modifications are not possible for past flights.
